tape: Mixed-but-firm: S&P +0.28% (7536.7)/Nasdaq +0.55% (26015) on cooler June CPI (3.5%, -0.4% m/m) and a JPM beat ($6.14 vs $5.59 est) leading bank earnings, while Dow -0.86% (52046) lags -- but the US Strait of Hormuz cargo-toll blockade starts enforcing 4pm ET TODAY, a live into-the-close event risk that keeps research.json's risk_off call intact even as quant_regime KMeans reads calm_drift (vol 14.1% ann) and VIX sits ~17.2.

alerts.headline: NTSK +7.2% today (~$14.19); Iconiq Strategic Partners (largest backer) bought $7.2M at $11.82 on 7/8 after the selloff -- this partly offsets risk.json's flag of Lightspeed's ~$18M post-lockup selling (also 7/8), so net insider flow is mixed, not one-directional. Buy consensus, avg PT $16. FinBERT +0.16. The move is already in the tape, not a fresh un-priced catalyst.

No new offering/ATM/shelf found in search today -- consistent with risk.json's 'no confirmed dilution mechanism.' Stock stabilizing ~$2.12 (position now +$1.42) but this is still a post-48%-pump fade the bot's own critic vetoed 3x today for dilution-history/pump-signature; keep on AVOID, do not add.

No fresh news; CEO Bhappu ($968k 7/7) and chairman Hansen (7/8) insider buys already known, as is the $725M OSC financing and the ~$1.9B Vacuumschmelze rare-earth acquisition. Down ~-7% YTD, held position -$1.37. Active $300M ATM (risk.json elevated) + Lorentzian -0.75 bearish still unaddressed by the insider-buy thesis.
